daily.today_energy: Your intuitive radar is buzzing today, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings—they're picking up on something real. This is your moment to lean into your own wisdom rather than seeking outside validation.
daily.love: Vulnerability hits different when you're authentic about it. If you're single, your genuine energy is magnetic rn. In a relationship, a real conversation could deepen things in ways you've been craving.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is next level today. Don't dim your ideas to fit the room—your unique perspective is exactly what's needed. Channel that dreamy energy into something concrete and watch people take notice.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Whether that's extra sleep, time near water, or just moving slower—honor what you need. Your nervous system will thank you for the self-compassion.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of introspection, Pisces. This week invites you to pause and listen to what your intuition's been whispering. Trust the quiet moments—they're teaching you something real.
weekly.love: Venus is softening the edges around your heart. Whether you're single or coupled up, this is prime time for vulnerable conversations that actually land. Let people see the real you, mess and all.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is hitting different right now. Channel that into projects that feel authentic, even if they seem unconventional. Your unique perspective is literally your superpower—stop doubting it.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more gentleness this week. This is your sign to prioritize rest without guilt, move in ways that feel good rather than punishing, and hydrate like it's your job.
